name: Butter Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a saucepan over medium-low heat.
2. Whisk in the flour to form a white roux.
3. Add the water and whisk until smooth.
4. Cook, stirring frequently, for 10 minutes or until thickened.
5. Combine yolks and cream to make a liaison.
6. Add 1 tablespoon hot sauce and mix well.
7. Slowly stir the tempered liaison back into the hot sauce, stirring constantly until just below the simmering point; do not boil.
8. Stir in lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Strain through a chinois or cheesecloth.
10. Add pieces of butter one at a time and keep warm; serve hot or warm.
